[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1100000 2
1 0111010 4
2 0111110 5
3 1011001 4
4 1100011 4
5 1111011 6
6 0111110 5
7 1011001 4

01 10 1011001 4 match 3 7
12 21 1101001 4
23 32 1111010 5
34 43 0111110 5 match 2 6
45 54 1111110 6
56 65 1011011 5
67 76 1011011 5
70 07 1011011 5

02 20 1110000 3
13 31 1111011 6 match 5
24 42 1111110 6
35 53 1111010 5
46 64 0111111 6
57 75 1011011 5
60 06 0010011 3
71 17 1011011 5

03 30 0111010 4 match 1
14 41 1111111 a
25 52 1111000 4
36 63 0111011 5
47 74 1111111 a
50 05 1011000 3
61 16 1001011 4
72 27 1111011 6 match 5

04 40 0111110 5 match 2 6

37 73 1111011 6 match 5
